buildName: PROOF REVIEW APPROVAL BUTTON + LOCK STATUS FIX
features: Fixes Proof Review row/detail mismatch where a proof row said Pending Review while the detail rail was locked by a published report
Adds row-level Approve and Reject buttons for proof that is truly pending and reviewable
Shows Report Published locked status for proof attached to an already-published report
Adds Report Published tab and removes locked proof from Pending Review counts
Keeps approved proof include/remove controls available until the report is published
Keeps rejected proof locked and blocked from report inclusion
Adds View Report Archive action for locked proof
Preserves v3.0.68 Client Report preview and download fixes
